channel.title: summarizedStoriesMainNLpolitics
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from summarizedStoriesMainNLpolitics, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: CEOs are losing confidence, new survey finds
item.description: Data from The Conference Board and The Business Council shows a number below 50 reflects more negative than positive responses, indicating declining CEO confidence.

item.title: Exclusive: Trump intensifies pressure on Cuba
item.description: The Trump administration is preparing for a possible collapse of Cuba's government this summer and has simulated military responses.

item.title: Corporate America faces AI reality check
item.description: Business leaders are questioning whether high AI spending is producing real results as companies that rushed to adopt the technology face scrutiny.

item.title: U.S. and Iran clash again amid peace negotiations
item.description: Iran launched four one-way drones at a commercial ship in the Strait of Hormuz, according to a U.S. official, prompting a military response.
